//: OPT-IN, SHOWCASE-ONLY PROFILE. Run via `npm run gate:lh:showcase`.
//desc: For designated hero/marketing pages with an intentional jaw-drop moment (3D/shader hero, rich orchestrated motion). It RELAXES THE PERFORMANCE BUDGET ONLY. The default `lighthouserc.json` stays strict and is what every other page is held to.
//nonnegotiable: Accessibility (>=0.95), CLS (<=0.1), and non-composited-animations (=0) are NOT relaxed here — a showcase hero earns a bigger byte/LCP/TBT budget, it never earns the right to drop a11y, jank layout, or run animations off the compositor. Reduced-motion is enforced separately and as a HARD gate in playwright/reduced-motion.spec.ts.
//scope: Point `url` at the specific hero/marketing route(s) only — do NOT apply this profile site-wide.

assertions.//perf-relaxed: Performance budget flexes for an intentional showcase hero.
assertions.//byte-budget-relaxed: A 3D/shader/motion hero legitimately ships more JS, more bytes, bigger textures. Cap them so 'showcase' never becomes 'unbounded'.
assertions.//NON-NEGOTIABLE-BELOW: These match (or exceed) the strict default profile and MUST NOT be loosened for a showcase page.
